case_title: DAROLYN DAVIS VS. SALESI TILITI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THIRD DEFENDANT TO JAN-11-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DAROLYN DAVIS. APPEARANCY BY DEFENDANTS SALESI TILITI AND DENNIS KOURUMALOS WHO DO NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT KOURUMALOS, DENNIS DBA CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS SALESI TILITI, DENNIS KOURUMALOS AND CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED MAY-23-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TILITI, SALESI DBA CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY DAVIS, DAROLYN AS TO DEFENDANT TILITI, SALESI DBA CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE KOURUMALOS, DENNIS DBA CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-19-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERKS: S. VANTREE AND L. FONG. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED MAY-23-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOURUMALOS, DENNIS DBA CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-22-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON 3RD DEFENDANT, CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE TO JANUARY 11, 2017 AT 8:30. DEFENDANTS, SALESI TILITI AND DENNIS KUORUMALOS DO NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED DEC-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DENNIS KOURUMALOS DBA CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-11-2017 AT 8:30 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, DAROLYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TILITI, SALESI DBA CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DENNIS KOURUMALOS DBA CONTINENTAL APPLIANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
